title: Finite Wolfe Line-Search Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite Wolfe line-search bad minimizer and bad curvature QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact line-minimizer replay computes alpha=1/2 and x=0, so the malformed minimizer row claiming alpha=1 and x=-1 is contradictory; exact Wolfe curvature replay computes violation 2 for alpha=1, so the malformed nonpositive-violation row is inconsistent.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional Wolfe rows only when they add distinct strong-Wolfe, nonconvex, stochastic, or convergence pressure; keep general line-search convergence and rate theorems in horizon lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite Wolfe line-search witnesses as deterministic exact-rational replay rows.
Replay derivatives, descent directions, exact minimizer candidates, sufficient-decrease inequalities, curvature inequalities, and curvature violations over exact rationals.
Route false exact-line-minimizer and Wolfe curvature claims through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the offending exact-rational conflict.
Keep general Wolfe existence, convergence, rate, stochastic, and floating-point stability claims marked Lean-horizon until proof artifacts exist.
